introduction: The film follows the relationship between two young adults (20 years old). The young man is aware that his girlfriend works as a prostitute to support herself and her grandmother, and to have plans together for a better life.Short film banned by Vietnamese censors in Hanoi, screened at the 65th Venice Film Festival:Vietnamese authorities said the 20-minute film, made more than two years ago, could damage Vietnam's image and banned it from screens at home and abroad."The young woman's image, lifestyle and activities run counter to Vietnamese customs, traditions and way of life," Le Ngoc Minh of the Vietnamese Department of Cinema.However the authorities recognised the film's technical value and allowed it to be viewed by cinema professionals and students.
